topic: Retrieval-grounded agent systems for literature review drafting
target_contribution: Clarify whether explicit grounding improves citation faithfulness and user trust in academic writing support systems.
research_questions: How does retrieval grounding affect citation faithfulness in literature review drafting systems?
How does grounding affect perceived controllability and trust for researchers?
hypotheses: Retrieval-grounded systems will produce fewer unsupported claims than non-grounded systems.
Retrieval-grounded systems will improve user trust when evidence provenance is exposed.
